seo.title: Privacy Policy - onsmartAI
seo.description: onsmartAI privacy policy. Learn how we protect your personal data and respect your privacy.
seo.keywords: privacy policy, data protection, LGPD, privacy, onsmartAI

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.content: onsmartAI ("we", "our" or "company") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
2.subtitle1Content: We may collect the following personal information:

3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
items: Respond to your inquiries and requests

4.title: 4. Information Sharing
4.content: We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following circumstances:
items: To service providers who assist us

5.title: 5. Cookies
5.content: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, but this may affect the functionality of the website.

6.title: 6. Your Rights (LGPD)
6.content: Under the General Data Protection Law (LGPD), you have the right to:
rights: Confirm the existence of data processing

7.title: 7. Security
7.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.

8.title: 8. Contact
8.content: To exercise your rights or clarify questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us:
